title: strophopappus pohlii
intro: Strophopappus pohlii is a plant species native to Ecuador, belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the sunflower or daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Strophopappus pohlii include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and providing relief from coughs and sore throats. Strophopappus pohlii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a tincture or in combination with other herbs.
